target: Batch: OBE confirmations for cluster-label fixes (EXP-540/541) + live-fetch paragraph correction in §2b.1 (EXP-542/ISS-2383) + TLDR HTML markup plain-text rewrite on WIN-052/053/064/070 (EXP-546/ISS-2392)

obe_resolutions.reason: Already resolved. All 8 magnetic-broad cluster members (WIN-040/041/042/043/057b/059/060/063) already carry detail_group='WIN-040-043, 057b, 059-060, 063' in data/wins.json at time of this run. No patch needed.
Already resolved. WIN-059, WIN-060, WIN-063 detail_evidence all contain the corrected cluster string 'WIN-040-043, 057b, 059-060, 063'. No patch needed.

patches.description: ISS-2383: Correct live-fetch WIN list in §2b.1 — remove WIN-004 (monitoring=hardcoded) and WIN-024 (monitoring=hardcoded) from the list; retain only WIN-006 and WIN-007 (monitoring=live_fetch). Change 'All four data sources' to 'All {{CA_LIVE}} data sources' (dynamic). Remove INTERMAGNET reference which was tied to WIN-004.
patches.find_pattern: The WINs that fetch live data are WIN-004 (SAA separation, from NOAA/INTERMAGNET), WIN-006 and WIN-007 (North Magnetic Pole drift, from NOAA NP.xy), and WIN-024 (Roaring 40s correlation, from CPC/NOAA AAO index). All four data sources are produced by institutions that use spherical-Earth geodetic reference frames (WGS84, IGRF) to process their raw measurements. NOAA's magnetic observatory data is corrected for station latitude and longitude on a spherical Earth; INTERMAGNET stations report in geocentric coordinates.
patches.replace_pattern: The WINs that fetch live data are WIN-006 and WIN-007 (North Magnetic Pole drift, from NOAA NP.xy). All {{CA_LIVE}} data sources are produced by institutions that use spherical-Earth geodetic reference frames (WGS84, IGRF) to process their raw measurements. NOAA's magnetic observatory data is corrected for station latitude and longitude on a spherical Earth.
patches.verification: WIN-004.code_analysis.monitoring=hardcoded confirmed; WIN-024.code_analysis.monitoring=hardcoded confirmed; WIN-006.code_analysis.monitoring=live_fetch confirmed; WIN-007.code_analysis.monitoring=live_fetch confirmed. CA_LIVE=2. Full template dynamic ID list ({{CA_LIVE_IDS}}) would require a generate-html.js context addition — noted as aspirational follow-up for decider, not implemented here (NEVER_PUSH constraint).

patches.description: ISS-2392 Path A: Rewrite TLDR fields on WIN-052/053/064/070 to plain text (no HTML tags) — HTML in tldr fields renders as escaped text in the current pipeline.

changes.change: JPL D-22027 → JPL D-22027 (anchor removed, citation text preserved)

patches.rationale: Path A (cohort text rewrite) chosen over Path B (generate-html.js pipeline fix) because generate-html.js is NEVER_PUSH per decider rules. All 5 changes preserve meaning; HTML structure was purely presentational (superscripts, emphasis, cross-link) — content is fully intact in plain-text form.

tldr_evidence: ISS-2378/2379 OBE (cluster labels already correct in wins.json). ISS-2383 fixed: live-fetch paragraph now lists only WIN-006/007 (both monitoring=live_fetch); WIN-004/WIN-024 (monitoring=hardcoded) removed; 'All four' → 'All {{CA_LIVE}}'. ISS-2392 fixed: HTML tags stripped from WIN-052/053/064/070 TLDR fields (Path A — plain-text rewrite).
